title: Start Timing
description: Campaign start timing. Accepts either string shorthand (legacy) or a typed object form. Sellers MUST resolve object-form timing to an ISO 8601 datetime before storing; get_media_buys responses return the resolved string.

oneOf.description: Start campaign as soon as possible (legacy string form)
Scheduled start date/time in ISO 8601 format (legacy string form)
Start campaign as soon as possible (object form)

time.description: Scheduled start date/time in ISO 8601 format
